# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant Evolution: From Guidance to Guided Practice
- Summary: Show how CodeGrind’s AI assistant has evolved to provide multi-model guidance, real-time feedback, and seamless integration with Google Sign-In, enhancing DSA practice without leaving the platform.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-evolution
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-evolution
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-09-codegrind-ai-assistant-evolution.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers an enhanced AI assistant experience with Azure OpenAI GPT-4o support, model switching, persistent chat, and tighter integration with authentication flows, delivering smarter, more contextual guidance during DSA practice in a single, cohesive environment.
- CTA: Try the new AI-assisted problem-solving flow in CodeGrind and sign in with Google to experience seamless progress tracking.
- Visual brief: A short, 45-60 second walkthrough video: opening with the CodeGrind problem editor, AI chat panel on the side, quick model-switch UI, and a before/after scenario showing AI guidance improving a sample LeetCode-style problem. End with a close-up of Google sign-in flow and a progress dashboard.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
